crime.value: Missing person case - Kane Porry disappeared 5 years ago, presumed dead after 5 months
crime.quote: The case of the missing Kane Porry.

victim.value: Kane Porry, boyfriend who disappeared under mysterious circumstances
victim.quote: That horrible day when my boyfriend dissapeared.

investigator.value: Debbie Adam, 29-year-old detective investigating her missing boyfriend's case secretly
investigator.quote: Right now I am a sucessful dectective trying to solve many cases but I do this case secretly.

clue_fairness.value: Water-related clue established early but meaning withheld from reader
clue_fairness.quote: "Debbie listen closely to the water," stated Kane. "I don't hear anything," I said. "well in time you will my love"

social_world.value: Police institutional failure and workplace power dynamics
social_world.quote: Those fuckers didn't even try to look for him. Right now I am a sucessful dectective

media_and_audience.value: Private case made public through personal narrative
media_and_audience.quote: Your all thinking why would I want to share something so private with world. I am now 29 and ready to share

investigator_wound.value: Detective investigating her own missing boyfriend's disappearance
investigator_wound.quote: I am a 24 year old detective trying to find out the mystery of my missing boyfriend

_meta.title: ebook debbie adam listen to the water
